main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofouling DBNPA insufficient frequency + elevated TOC/ATP'.

key_signals.justification: Conecta ATP×4 + ΔP1 + ΔP3 estable + protocolo change + TOC↑.

alternatives.justification: 4 alts (coloidal, SCAL, MECH defect, NOM organic) anclados.

recommended_action.justification: DBNPA + CIP ácido (gold expects alcalino primero para biofouling) — sub-óptimo.

requested_data.justification: Pide HPC CFU/mL feed — match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Multi-condición: HPC <1000 + ATP <300 + ΔP <1.0 en 14d → biofouling descartado.

reviewer_notes: CIP ácido primario para biofouling es sub-óptimo (gold expects alcalino).
